zh-CN.name: 猴子
zh-CN.intro: 猴子是一种聪明又活泼的小动物，身上有软软的毛，还有一条长长的尾巴。猴子喜欢在树上跳来跳去，也喜欢和朋友们一起玩耍。

story.title: 🐵小猴子找香蕉
story.body: 小猴子皮皮最喜欢吃香蕉。一天早上，皮皮醒来发现香蕉不见了。它跳到树上东张西望，又荡到另一棵树上仔细找，还是没看到。皮皮有点着急，抓着树枝晃来晃去。忽然，它闻到一股香味。皮皮顺着香味往下爬，看见树下有串黄黄的香蕉。原来昨晚风把香蕉吹掉下来了。皮皮开心极了，拿起香蕉一口一口吃得可香了。吃完后，它爬到树上，靠着树枝晃着尾巴，满足地看着天空。

knowledge.title: 猴子为什么喜欢爬树？
knowledge.body: 猴子喜欢爬树，是因为树上更安全。它们能在树上找到喜欢吃的果实和叶子，还可以在高处躲避危险。猴子的手脚很有力气，能牢牢抓住树枝，跳来跳去也不会掉下来。

en.name: Monkey
en.intro: A monkey is a clever and lively little animal with soft fur and a long tail. Monkeys love to jump around in trees and play with their friends.

story.title: 🐵Little Monkey Looks for a Banana
story.body: Pipi the little monkey loved bananas most of all. One morning, Pipi woke up and saw that his banana was missing. He jumped up a tree and looked around, then swung to another tree to search carefully, but he still couldn’t find it. Pipi felt a little worried and swayed on a branch. Suddenly, he smelled something sweet. Following the smell, he climbed down and saw a bunch of yellow bananas under the tree. The wind had blown them down last night. Pipi was so happy! He took a banana and ate it bite by bite with great pleasure. After finishing, he climbed back up, leaned against a branch, swayed his tail, and looked at the sky with a satisfied smile.

knowledge.title: Why do monkeys love climbing trees?
knowledge.body: Monkeys love climbing trees because it is safer there. They can find fruits and leaves they enjoy eating, and they can stay away from danger. A monkey’s hands and feet are strong, so they can hold branches tightly and jump around without falling.
